name: Vusala Akanksha
my_twin: If I had a personal digital twin, it would track my brain activity because there are certain times when i lock in and focus completely on a task and this usually happens when i am reading books of my interest like i could endlessly go on reading and also while listening to music helps me focus at times so tracking that would help me apply the same while studying or to do productive tasks , also i would want to see how my brain responds to different emotions and how it processes thoughts (might help me understand my root cause of overthinking the smallest things)
